h1.data-en: The Ultimate ERP System to Run Your Business

div.h1: The Ultimate ERP System to Run Your Business

p.data-ar: دفترة هو حل سحابي شامل ومتكامل، مطور خصيصاً لإدارة كل احتياجاتك من تمويل ومحاسبة ومبيعات وإنشاء فواتير إلكترونية متوافقة ومخزون وعلاقات عملاء وموظفين وعمليات — كل ذلك مخصص حسب قطاعك.
p.data-en: Daftra is a cloud-based, all-in-one solution specifically developed to address end-to-end all your finance, accounting, sales, create compliant e-invoices, inventory, customer relations, employees, and operations—all industry-customized.

div.p: Daftra is a cloud-based, all-in-one solution specifically developed to address end-to-end all your finance, accounting, sales, create compliant e-invoices, inventory, customer relations, employees, and operations—all industry-customized.

div.h2:
Empower Your System
And Solidify Your Business

p.data-ar: اربط نظامك مباشرة بمنصة فاتورة وأصدر فواتير إلكترونية متوافقة في الوقت الفعلي، مع توقيعات رقمية وأرقام تسلسلية وتخزين آمن للبيانات وإرسال تلقائي دون أي تدخل يدوي.
p.data-en: Directly connect your system to Fatora platform and issue compliant electronic invoices in real-time, with digital signatures, serial numbers, secure data storage, and automatic sending without any manual intervention.

div.p: Directly connect your system to Fatora platform and issue compliant electronic invoices in real-time, with digital signatures, serial numbers, secure data storage, and automatic sending without any manual intervention.

h3.data-en: Seamless update that meets the authority's requirements.

div.h3: Seamless update that meets the authority's requirements.

p.data-ar: ابقَ على اطلاع دائم ببرنامج الفوترة الإلكترونية من دفترة، الذي يلبي أحدث متطلبات هيئة الزكاة والضريبة والجمارك المتعلقة بالمرحلة الثانية من الفوترة الإلكترونية، لتجنب انقطاع مسيرتك التجارية.
p.data-en: Stay up to date with the electronic invoicing program from Daftra, which meets the latest requirements of ZATCA regarding phase two of electronic invoicing, to avoid disrupting your business journey.

div.p: Stay up to date with the electronic invoicing program from Daftra, which meets the latest requirements of ZATCA regarding phase two of electronic invoicing, to avoid disrupting your business journey.
Find out your industry. Find out how Daftra fits your business for free.
Automate invoicing and generate accurate estimates and quotes instantly. Set custom tax mandates, apply discounts, and share invoices across channels.
Cloud-based and offline-ready POS system for retail and services with barcode scanning and real-time inventory sync.
Allow customers to pay in installments with automatic reminders, tracking, and complete financial integration.
Set sales targets and track commissions to motivate your sales team with clear, measurable goals.
Create targeted promotions with flexible pricing rules, seasonal discounts, and customer-specific price lists.
Manage insurance policies, track claims, and handle coverage details integrated with your billing workflow.
Automate general ledger, modify chart of accounts, generate income statements, and balance sheets with precision.
Track all expenses, manage budgets, and get real-time financial insights across your business.
Smart asset management including registration, automatic depreciation, and disposal tracking.
Distribute expenses and revenues to cost centers and analyze profitability per department or project.
Manage checks through clear steps from issuance to collection with full audit trail.

div.h2: Accounting has become easier — even for non-accountants!
div.p: All your invoicing, payment, accounting, and cashflow working in unison.
Flexible management for unlimited products and services with categories, variants, and barcode support.
Streamline internal purchase requests with approval workflows.
Conduct inventory counts to match actual quantities with system records.
Organized records and precise tracking of supplier relationships and purchase orders.
Complete purchase lifecycle from requisition to receipt with full cost tracking.

h2.data-ar: منصة شاملة ومرنة لإدارة الموارد البشرية (HRM)

div.p: Create organizational charts reflecting your company structure with departments and positions.
Generate salaries based on attendance, components, and bonuses accurately.
Track employee attendance in real-time linked directly to payroll with multi-shift support.
Manage all HR requests from one place with custom approval stages and workflows.

div.h2: One Easy Platform for Everything HR.
div.p: Business leaders, executive managers, and staff all working in unison.
Create work orders, set priorities, and track custom statuses automatically.
Automate business processes with customizable workflow rules and triggers.

p.data-ar: حدد دورة التصنيع الكاملة من المواد الخام إلى المنتجات النهائية باستخدام قائمة المواد (BOM).
p.data-en: Define complete manufacturing cycle from raw materials to finished products with BOM.

div.p: Define complete manufacturing cycle from raw materials to finished products with BOM.

p.data-ar: أدر الحجوزات بتكامل ذكي يربط المواعيد بالفواتير.
p.data-en: Manage reservations with smart integration linking appointments to invoices.

div.p: Manage reservations with smart integration linking appointments to invoices.

p.data-ar: أجرِ أي وحدة بسهولة وأدر كل شيء من مكان واحد مع تتبع العقود.
p.data-en: Rent any unit easily and manage everything from one place with contract tracking.

div.p: Rent any unit easily and manage everything from one place with contract tracking.

p.data-ar: تتبع ساعات العمل على المهام والمشاريع واحسب التكاليف تلقائياً.
p.data-en: Track work hours on tasks and projects and calculate costs automatically.

div.p: Track work hours on tasks and projects and calculate costs automatically.

h2.data-en: Online CRM to Put Your Clients First
h2.data-ar: نظام CRM أونلاين يضع عملاءك في المقدمة

div.h2: Online CRM to Put Your Clients First

p.data-ar: صنف العملاء حسب المشتريات أو الأنشطة، وقم بالإدارة بناءً على اقتراب مواعيد التجديد أو انتهاء الاشتراكات.
p.data-en: Categorize customers per purchases or activities, manage on nearing renewals or expiring subscriptions.

div.p: Categorize customers per purchases or activities, manage on nearing renewals or expiring subscriptions.

p.data-ar: إدارة العضويات والاشتراكات بالكامل من مكان واحد مع التجديد التلقائي.
p.data-en: Fully manage memberships and subscriptions from one place with auto-renewals.

div.p: Fully manage memberships and subscriptions from one place with auto-renewals.

p.data-ar: نظام مرن لإدارة النقاط والأرصدة لعروض العملاء الذكية.
p.data-en: Flexible system to manage points and balances for smart customer offers.

div.p: Flexible system to manage points and balances for smart customer offers.

p.data-ar: كافئ العملاء بالنقاط مقابل المشتريات وفعل برامج ولاء مخصصة.
p.data-en: Reward customers with points for purchases and activate custom loyalty programs.

div.p: Reward customers with points for purchases and activate custom loyalty programs.

h2.data-ar: رواد الأعمال والشركات الناشئة والأعمال المتنامية

div.h2:
رواد الأعمال
والشركات الناشئة
والأعمال المتنامية

p.data-en: Expand and scale your business with Daftra.
p.data-ar: وسّع أعمالك مع دفترة.

div.p: وسّع أعمالك مع دفترة.

h2.data-en: For you, for every size of business
h2.data-ar: لك ولكل حجم من أحجام الأعمال

div.h2: لك ولكل حجم من أحجام الأعمال

p.data-en: Unleash your potential. Unlock your growth.
p.data-ar: أطلق إمكاناتك. افتح آفاق نموك.

div.p: أطلق إمكاناتك. افتح آفاق نموك.

h2.data-en: Daftra on Your iOS & Android Devices

div.h2: Daftra on Your iOS & Android Devices

p.data-ar: المبيعات، المحاسبة، الموارد البشرية، المخزون، إدارة علاقات العملاء، العمليات والتقارير؛ أعمالك في متناول يدك.
p.data-en: Sales, Accounting, HRM, Inventory, CRM, Operations, and Reporting; Your business at your fingertips.

div.p: Sales, Accounting, HRM, Inventory, CRM, Operations, and Reporting; Your business at your fingertips.

p.data-ar: تطبيق نقطة بيع سحابي وغير متصل بالإنترنت للبيع بالتجزئة والخدمات مع مسح الباركود ومزامنة المخزون الفورية.
p.data-en: Cloud-based and offline-ready POS app for retail and services with barcode scanning and real-time inventory sync.

div.p: Cloud-based and offline-ready POS app for retail and services with barcode scanning and real-time inventory sync.

p.data-ar: يمكّن الموظفين من إدارة طلباتهم ومتابعة حضورهم وإجازاتهم بشكل مستقل.
p.data-en: Empowers employees to manage their requests, attendance, and leaves independently.

div.p: Empowers employees to manage their requests, attendance, and leaves independently.

p.data-ar: امسح إيصالاتك وأضف مصروفاتك فوراً بكاميرا هاتفك.
p.data-en: Scan receipts and add your expenses instantly using your phone camera.

div.p: Scan receipts and add your expenses instantly using your phone camera.

p.data-ar: أجرِ جرد مخزونك بدقة باستخدام ماسح الباركود عبر هاتفك.
p.data-en: Conduct precise inventory counts using your phone's barcode scanner.

div.p: Conduct precise inventory counts using your phone's barcode scanner.

div.style: margin-top:12px; background:#4318FF; color:white; padding:8px; border-radius:10px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold;
margin-top:12px; background:#4318FF; color:white; padding:8px; border-radius:10px; text-align:center;

span.data-en: Is Your Perfect Partner For Business Solution?

h2.span: Is Your Perfect Partner For Business Solution?

p.data-ar: دفترة تنمو وتتطور باستمرار ودعمنا يتوسع بالتوازي معها. تحديثاتنا الدائمة، مهما كانت خطتك، تضمن أن يظل برنامجك محدثاً دائماً حتى تنمو أعمالك مع دفترة.
p.data-en: Daftra is rapidly and constantly growing and our support expands in response. Our forever updates, whatever your plan is, ensures your software is always covered so your business can grow with Daftra.

div.p: Daftra is rapidly and constantly growing and our support expands in response. Our forever updates, whatever your plan is, ensures your software is always covered so your business can grow with Daftra.

p.data-ar: دفترة متوافقة مع اللائحة الأوروبية لحماية البيانات (GDPR)، مستضافة على خوادم سحابية ومشفرة بـ SSL بقوة 256 بت لضمان سلامة بياناتك وأمانها.
p.data-en: Daftra is GDPR-compliant, hosted on cloud-based servers, and 256-bit SSL-encrypted to ensure your data integrity, safety, and security.

div.p: Daftra is GDPR-compliant, hosted on cloud-based servers, and 256-bit SSL-encrypted to ensure your data integrity, safety, and security.

p.data-ar: يلبي دعم دفترة كل احتياجات عملك على مدار الساعة طوال أيام الأسبوع لأقصى رضا عملائنا. لن تضل أبداً في استخدام نظامنا بكفاءة.
p.data-en: Daftra support caters to every business need, 24/7, to our customer base utmost satisfaction. You are never lost using our system efficiently.

div.p: Daftra support caters to every business need, 24/7, to our customer base utmost satisfaction. You are never lost using our system efficiently.

p.data-ar: أينما كنت ومتى شئت ومن أي جهاز مسجّل، احصل على وصول فوري عبر السحابة. حتى في وضع عدم الاتصال مع تطبيق دفترة المكتبي.
p.data-en: Wherever or whenever you are and from any logged-in device, get instant cloud-based access. Even offline with Daftra's desktop app.

div.p: Wherever or whenever you are and from any logged-in device, get instant cloud-based access. Even offline with Daftra's desktop app.

h2.data-ar: انضم إلى أكثر من 40 ألف عمل ينمو مع دفترة
h2.data-en: Join 40K+ Businesses Already Growing With Daftra

div.h2: Join 40K+ Businesses Already Growing With Daftra

p.data-ar: محرك أعمال وتقنيات لكل عمل ليزدهر.
p.data-en: Business and technology enablers for every business to thrive.

div.p: Business and technology enablers for every business to thrive.

div.data-ar: موظف تخدمهم منصة إدارة الموارد البشرية
div.data-en: Employees served via the HRM Platform

div.div: Employees served via the HRM Platform

p.data-ar: هل لديك ملاحظة أو اقتراح أو تحتاج مساعدة؟ سنوفر لك المساعدة التي تحتاجها على مدار الساعة مجاناً.
p.data-en: Have feedback, a suggestion, or need assistance? We'll get you the help you need 24/7 for free.

div.p: Have feedback, a suggestion, or need assistance? We'll get you the help you need 24/7 for free.

p.data-ar: اكتشف مقالات متعمقة وشروحات خطوة بخطوة لاستخدام دفترة وإدارة أعمالك بكفاءة.
p.data-en: Discover in-depth articles and step-by-step tutorials to use Daftra and manage your business efficiently.

div.p: Discover in-depth articles and step-by-step tutorials to use Daftra and manage your business efficiently.

p.data-ar: فريقنا سعيد للإجابة على استفساراتك حول المبيعات، بما في ذلك استعراض حالات الاستخدام والفواتير وخيارات الأسعار.
p.data-en: Our team is happy to answer your sales inquiries, including exploring use cases, billing, and pricing options.

div.p: Our team is happy to answer your sales inquiries, including exploring use cases, billing, and pricing options.

p.data-ar: انشر تطبيقاتك المخصصة على سوق دفترة مع أكثر من 40 ألف مستخدم.
p.data-en: Publish your custom apps on Daftra's Marketplace with 40k+ users.

div.p: Publish your custom apps on Daftra's Marketplace with 40k+ users.
